title: ‘No tanks, please’: euphemisms don’t conceal Putin’s insecurity
summary_full: The Victory Day parade is the latest casualty of Russian war fatigue and growing doubt in the regime’s capacity to ensure basic security
summary_public: The Victory Day parade is the latest casualty of Russian war fatigue and growing doubt in the regime’s capacity to ensure basic security
